channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-20
item.description:
It's been an exciting period across our open-source research tools, with multiple projects seeing significant updates. Notably, the `ontogenerator` in the `quest-bih/oddpub` repository was updated to version 7.3.0, featuring a revised Zenodo badge and documentation updates. Meanwhile, `giladfeldman/docpluck` and `giladfeldman/escicheck` saw fixes and improvements, including a temporary fix for a caption issue and a synchronization with the `escicheckapp` repository. The `Davidvandijcke/coarse` project also made important fixes, re-enabling Fable 5 in the model picker, while `JamieCummins/regcheck` addressed several bugs, including issues with card previews and ad blocker interference. These updates demonstrate the collaborative spirit and dedication to progress across our community, and we celebrate the efforts of all contributors who are helping to advance our research tools.

32 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
metacheck8 commits
regcheck8 commits
tenzing7 commits
